# To re-render manually:
#   glyphplotter --input 02BC.txt --output 02BC.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+02BC
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 559 0 /uni02BC
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+02BC"
move 1400
